conservative.name: Gut Instinct
conservative.requirements: 7 favour, not currently engaged in combat

success.description: You get a hunch that you might be in danger. If there is a threat to your health or freedom somewhere within medium range (such as a hidden enemy, trap, or patrolling guard) you know that you're in danger
As above, and you identify the single most dangerous threat within medium range (as determined by the GM)

boon.description: The blessing works out to long range

chaosStar.description: Danger is everywhere! Gain the Cowed condition until all the dangers are removed

sigmarsComet.description: You gain the insight into the dangers, including how many there are, and receive to your first check to deal with each danger (including initiative checks)

reckless.name: Gut Instinct
reckless.requirements: 7 favour, not currently engaged in combat

success.description: You get a hunch that you might be in danger. If there is a threat to your health or freedom somewhere within medium range (such as a hidden enemy, trap, or patrolling guard) you know that you're in danger
As above, and you identify the single most dangerous threat within medium range (as determined by the GM)

boon.description: The blessing works out to long range

chaosStar.description: Danger is everywhere! Gain the Rattled condition until all dangers are removed

sigmarsComet.description: You're ready for anything! Gain the Inspired condition until you fail a check or suffer a wound
